content:
```mermaid
classDiagram
    class CssPipeline {
        -config: CssPipelineConfig
        -tailwind: TailwindEmitter
        -scanner: ContentScanner
        +process(entry: &Path) Result~CssOutput~
        +process_watch(entry: &Path, watcher: &Watcher) Result~()~
        -resolve_imports(css: &str, base: &Path) Result~String~
        -detect_directives(css: &str) DirectiveMap
        -expand_apply(css: &str) Result~String~
        -route_layers(css: &str) String
    }

    class ContentScanner {
        -project_root: PathBuf
        +scan(patterns: &[String]) Result~HashSet~String~~
        -extract_classes(source: &str) HashSet~String~
        -walk_glob(pattern: &str) Vec~PathBuf~
    }

    class TailwindEmitter {
        -config: TailwindConfig
        -plugins: Vec~Box~dyn PluginEmitter~~
        +generate(used: &HashSet~String~, mode: EmitMode) TailwindLayers
        -generate_base() String
        -generate_components() String
        -generate_utilities(used: &HashSet~String~) String
        -apply_variant(rule: &str, variant: &str) String
    }

    class TailwindConfig {
        +content: Vec~String~
        +dark_mode: DarkMode
        +theme: ThemeConfig
        +plugins: Vec~PluginRef~
        +from_js(path: &Path) Result~Self~
        +from_yaml(config: &JetConfig) Result~Self~
    }

    class ThemeConfig {
        +colors: HashMap~String, String~
        +spacing: HashMap~String, String~
        +extend: ThemeExtend
    }

    class PluginEmitter {
        <<trait>>
        +emit(used: &HashSet~String~) String
        +name() &str
    }

    class AnimateEmitter {
        +emit(used: &HashSet~String~) String
        +name() &str
    }

    class TypographyEmitter {
        +emit(used: &HashSet~String~) String
        +name() &str
    }

    class CssOutput {
        +css: String
        +source_map: Option~String~
        +hash: String
    }

    class TailwindLayers {
        +base: String
        +components: String
        +utilities: String
    }

    CssPipeline --> ContentScanner : uses
    CssPipeline --> TailwindEmitter : uses
    CssPipeline --> CssOutput : produces
    TailwindEmitter --> TailwindConfig : reads
    TailwindEmitter --> TailwindLayers : produces
    TailwindEmitter --> PluginEmitter : delegates
    TailwindConfig --> ThemeConfig : contains
    AnimateEmitter ..|> PluginEmitter
    TypographyEmitter ..|> PluginEmitter
```
